# Pull Request Template

## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring (no functional changes)

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- [ ] Test A
- [ ] Test B

## Checklist:

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules
- [ ] I have updated the changelog (if applicable)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (if applicable)

## Evolution-Specific Checklist

For changes that affect the evolution system:

- [ ] I have verified that safety constraints are maintained
- [ ] I have tested that the change doesn't cause regressions
- [ ] I have updated the skills documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] I have added a journal entry (if this is an evolution session)

## Screenshots (if appropriate)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Journal Entry (for evolution sessions)

If this PR is from an evolution session, include the journal entry:

```markdown
## Day N — YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM — Headline

Session result: **accepted/rejected**.

**Changes:** N lines modified.

**What worked:** ...
**What failed:** ...
**Lessons learned:** ...

---
```
